questions.question: Who is the current President of India (as of 2024)?
questions.explanation: Droupadi Murmu became the 15th President of India on 25 July 2022. She is the first tribal woman and the second woman to hold this position.

questions.question: Who is the current Prime Minister of India (as of 2024)?
questions.explanation: Narendra Modi has been the Prime Minister of India since May 2014. He was sworn in for a third consecutive term in June 2024.

questions.question: The Chandrayaan-3 mission successfully landed on the Moon's south pole in:
questions.explanation: Chandrayaan-3 successfully landed near the Moon's south pole on 23 August 2023, making India the first country to achieve a soft landing near the lunar south pole and the fourth country overall.

questions.question: The 2023 ICC Cricket World Cup was won by:
questions.explanation: Australia won the ICC Cricket World Cup 2023, defeating India in the final at Ahmedabad on 19 November 2023. It was Australia's sixth World Cup title.

questions.question: UPI (Unified Payments Interface) is operated by:
questions.explanation: UPI is operated by NPCI (National Payments Corporation of India). In 2023, India processed over 100 billion UPI transactions in a year for the first time.
